title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 311.400 - Unclaimed shipments of liquor may be sold
text:
311.400.  Unclaimed shipments of liquor may be sold. — Any railroad or express company doing business in this state shall have the right to sell unclaimed or refused shipments of intoxicating liquor in the same manner that such railroad or express company is or may be hereafter authorized to sell other unclaimed or refused property under the laws of this state, and no license or permit shall be required of such railroad or express company for such sale of such unclaimed or refused intoxicating liquor.
(RSMo 1939 § 4919)
